# GitHub Discussions Setup

This file documents the Discussions categories to enable on the repository.

GitHub Discussions must be enabled in repository Settings → Features → Discussions.
Once enabled, create the following categories:

| Category name | Format | Description |
|---------------|--------|-------------|
| **Q&A** | Question/Answer | Questions about setup, usage, the CLI, the API |
| **Ideas** | Open-ended discussion | Feature suggestions, roadmap feedback, things you wish existed |
| **Show and tell** | Open-ended discussion | What you built with Speculae — integrations, workflows, customisations |
| **Agent integrations** | Open-ended discussion | AI agent frameworks, workflows, and Speculae as an emotional continuity layer |
| **Wellness** | Open-ended discussion | Breathing exercises, journaling prompts, meditation patterns |
| **Announcements** | Announcement | Release notes and project updates (maintainer only) |

## Pinned discussions to create after setup

1. **Welcome to Speculae** — brief intro, links to docs, how to get help
2. **Roadmap and priorities** — link to ROADMAP.md, invite feedback on phase ordering
3. **Agent integrations showcase** — thread for sharing agent integration examples
